title: ACE Studio 2.0 from Timedomain
text:
Published 16/12/25
All-in-one AI studio software updated
Timedomain
have announced that the latest version of their all-in-one AI studio software is now available, and comes kitted out with a whole host of new AI Voices and languages, additional AI Instruments, new Generative Kits, an improved workflow and seamless DAW integration.
For those who aren’t familiar with
ACE Studio
, the software has been designed to allow users to create vocal parts and instrumentals without traditional recording equipment, instead relying on MIDI data, lyrics and word descriptions. It includes a wide range of royalty-free AI voice models — and provides users with the ability to create custom voice models from their own samples — and promises detailed control over vocal characteristics such as emotion, pitch and timing.
With the launch of version 2.0, the software’s Vocal Synth library now includes over 140 AI Voice Models, with new additions including multi-lingual Rap, Pop, Chanson, Ballad, Kids Choir and Country models. Four more languages have been added, bringing the total count to eight (English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, Italian, French and Portuguese), while several artist-made AI Instruments have been added to the Instrument Library, including violins, violas, cellos, saxophones (Bob Magnuson, Carlo Alfonso) trumpet (Xiaochuan Li) and a duduk. New Generative AI Kits include Inspire Me, Music Enhancer and Add a Layer; these new features are not only capable of generating samples, loops and layers, but also help to enhance and refine rough creative ideas.
Some improvements have also been made to the software’s Stem Splitter, Vocal to MIDI and ACE Bridge plug-ins.
Timedomain also make their stance on the use of AI in music clear, with their homepage proudly displaying the statement “We Respect Artists and Their Rights”, along with the following details on their outlook and practice:
Real Artists. Real Partners
: Every AI voice and instrument in ACE Studio is built on real performances — recorded, licensed and shared with the artists behind them.
Artist Powered. Artist Paid
: Our AI models are trained in partnership with professional instrumentalists and vocalists who receive royalty shares based on actual usage.
Human in the Loop. Never Replaced
: ACE Studio is built to empower creators, designed to extend your imagination, speed up your process, and give you expressive control - never to replace the human spark that drives music forward.
Compatibility
ACE Studio 2.0 is supported on PCs running Windows 10 or higher, and Macs running macOS 13 and above.
Pricing & Availability
ACE Studio 2.0 is available now, with pricing as follows:
ACE Studio Artist
: $398
ACE Studio Artist Pro
: $528
acestudio.ai
